response.justification: Bogdan meets the minimum requirement of 15 years of software engineering experience and demonstrates strong entrepreneurial drive through his open-source work. However, he lacks the deep, recognized artificial intelligence expertise and Director-level strategic leadership required for this Principal AI Strategy role, as his AI experience appears limited to very recent infrastructure tooling.
strengths: Over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience across web, mobile, and infrastructure.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative as the founder of an open-source Geo-Data platform.
Strong track record of technical community engagement through workshops, talks, and open-source contributions.
concerns: Lacks recognized, deep expertise in artificial intelligence and machine learning strategy.
Experience is primarily at the Senior/Staff level rather than the required Director-level strategic scope.
Limited evidence of advising strategic enterprise customers or driving high-level cloud product strategy.
